---
title: "When Computers Write Proofs, What's the Point of Mathematicians?"
description: "Is math just symbol pushing? Quanta and a Lean prover demo on the social side of mathematical proof."
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-09-02"
categories: [AI, mathematics, reasoning, formal verification, Lean, links, video]
image: cover.jpg
---

![[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/3l1RMiGeTfU)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Is math just symbol pushing?

When Computers Write Proofs, What's the Point of Mathematicians? [[1]](#ref-1)

Article: [[2]](#ref-2)

Lean theorem prover: [[3]](#ref-3)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_when-computers-write-proofs-whats-the-point-activity-7103595253072367616-Hdv7).*

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Quanta Magazine. "When Computers Write Proofs, What's the Point of Mathematicians?" (video). <https://youtu.be/3l1RMiGeTfU>

<a id="ref-2"></a>[2] "Why Mathematical Proof Is a Social Compact." *Quanta Magazine*, August 31, 2023. <https://www.quantamagazine.org/why-mathematical-proof-is-a-social-compact-20230831/>

<a id="ref-3"></a>[3] Lean theorem prover. <https://leanprover.github.io>
